summary: Iteration 2 (approval gating + admin tab + crimson theme): 26/26 backend pytest passed (after 60s rate-limit cooldown). Frontend verified: SCALE logo, three tabs (LOG IN/APPLY/REAPPLY), Apply form with email+reason fields, green submitted banner, amber pending notice on blocked login, admin login shows CREATOR badge + Admin tab, sub-tabs (pending/approved/rejected) functional, demo_user has neither badge nor admin tab. Crimson #a01e20 confirmed on submit/Buy buttons; Sell remains red (#f03e3e). Approve button click executed on a pending user.

minor.issue: Rate limiter (10/min/IP) is aggressive in tests; flaky 429s under burst signup. Tests now retry-on-429.

issues: Many sparkline/Recharts ResponsiveContainer warnings: 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' — minor; trend column renders but containers transiently size to -1 before layout. Consider giving the inline sparkline a fixed minWidth/minHeight to silence warnings.

action_items: Optional: silence Recharts ResponsiveContainer width/height warnings on Market trend column by setting minWidth/minHeight on the container.
Optional: for shared-IP environments, key signup rate limiter on X-Forwarded-For first hop instead of request.client.host.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~720 lines — split into routers (auth, admin, trade, leaderboard, market) for maintainability.
_seed_admin uses ADMIN_PASSWORD plaintext from env; idempotent re-seed does not refresh password hash if env changes.
_migrate_grandfather sets approvedAt = createdAt (could pre-date admin); fine but worth a comment.
/admin/applications has no pagination — fine until pending count grows.
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral pending users via /api/auth/signup with TEST-style uuid prefix; admin approve/reject/revoke flow exercised against fresh users each run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signup rate limit is 10/60s/IP; if you re-run backend tests back-to-back, sleep ~60s between runs (or expect retries). Frontend data-testids: tab-login/tab-signup/tab-reapply, input-username/password/confirm/email/reason, submit-auth, auth-info, auth-pending, tab-admin, admin-subtab-{pending|approved|rejected}, admin-approve-<username>, admin-reject-<username>, admin-revoke-<username>. Crimson var --blue=#a01e20 = rgb(160,30,32).
